description: Calculate the Porosity (Void Fraction) and Mean Pore Area of a sourdough bread slice using Fiji. Using the image at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/food_science/sourdough_slice.jpg (where the full width represents 14.0 cm), analyze a central 5x5 cm ROI to exclude the crust. Segment the dark air voids, filtering out particles with an area less than 0.005 cm². Save the resulting measurements to ~/Fiji_Data/results/food_science/pore_measurements.csv and a segmentation mask screenshot to ~/Fiji_Data/results/food_science/segmentation_check.png. Document the calculated Porosity % (Total Pore Area / ROI Area * 100) and Mean Pore Area in cm² in a report at ~/Fiji_Data/results/food_science/quality_report.txt.
